content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: File

Date: May 12, 1983
No.: M-83-127

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Ted Prim

Subject: Conversation with Vance Raye on May 11, 1983

I advised Vance Raye, council to the Governor, that money market funds were not reportable so long as they were diversified mutual funds.

TP:plh
